## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm tsc --noEmit` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] I've tested this in the browser (dev server)
- [ ] New types/interfaces are exported from the right file
- [ ] Colour values use `TERMINAL_THEME` tokens (no hardcoded colours outside the palette)
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production paths
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
